mapper.sql: id, user_id, plan_title, plan_content, plan_date, start_time, end_time, priority_level, plan_status, completion_time, remark, created_at, updated_at, deleted_flag
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO study_plan ( user_id, plan_title, plan_content, plan_date, start_time, end_time, priority_level, plan_status, completion_time, remark, created_at, updated_at, deleted_flag ) VALUES ( #{userId}, #{planTitle}, #{planContent}, #{planDate}, #{startTime}, #{endTime}, #{priorityLevel}, #{planStatus}, #{completionTime}, #{remark}, #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt}, #{deletedFlag} )
mapper.select: SELECT user_id FROM study_plan WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted_flag = 0 LIMIT 1
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM study_plan WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND deleted_flag = 0
mapper.update: UPDATE study_plan SET plan_title = #{studyPlan.planTitle}, plan_content = #{studyPlan.planContent}, plan_date = #{studyPlan.planDate}, start_time = #{studyPlan.startTime}, end_time = #{studyPlan.endTime}, priority_level = #{studyPlan.priorityLevel}, remark = #{studyPlan.remark}, updated_at = #{studyPlan.updatedAt} WHERE id = #{studyPlan.id} AND user_id = #{userId} AND deleted_flag = 0
